title: Equipment Scheduling
description: Schedule the use of laboratory equipment by completing the form below
notice: Scheduling is subject to availability and approval. You will receive a confirmation email within 24 business hours.

success.title: Request submitted!
success.description: Your request has been received. You will receive a confirmation email within 24 business hours.

equipment.title: Equipment and Schedule
equipment.description: Select the equipment to be used and your preferred schedule
equipment.requestedEquipmentsDescription: Add all equipment that will be used during the session.

project.title: Project Information
project.description: Details about your research and intended use
project.purposePlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of using the equipment...

terms.accept: I have read and accept the Laboratory Usage Responsibility Agreement
terms.description: I declare that I am aware of the biosafety regulations and take responsibility for the proper use of equipment and materials, as well as compliance with laboratory protocols.

importantInfo.title: Important Information
importantInfo.advanceNotice: Scheduling must be made at least 48 hours in advance
importantInfo.training: Completion of specific training for the requested equipment is mandatory
importantInfo.absence: In case of absence without justification, the user will be suspended for 30 days
importantInfo.usageTime: Equipment usage time may be limited according to availability and demand
importantInfo.materials: Materials and reagents are the user's responsibility unless otherwise agreed
importantInfo.damage: Any damage caused to the equipment will be the user's responsibility
